meaning: adj.无价值的,没有用的,垃圾似的
examples: She knows how to look like a total vixen without being trashy.
Of course everyone wants to do so in a classy and not trashy way!
In downtown New York, at a somewhat trashy apartment, there lived a man named Howard.
Unless Walmart can handle its shoppers giving it a trashy name during this holidays.
Some of it plays like a horror scenario, but one without the trashy chills provided by lesser moviemakers.
